name: Friendship Cake with Brandied Starter
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine cake mix and instant pudding mix in a large bowl.
2. Add vegetable oil and eggs to the mixture. Beat until smooth using an electric mixer at medium speed.
3. Fold in chopped nuts and about 1 cup of brandied fruit.
4. Pour the batter into a greased tube pan, filling it to the top.
5. Bake at 350°F for 50 to 60 minutes, or until done.
6. Allow the cake to cool completely before turning out of the pan.
7. Note: The cake freezes well. You can choose any cake mix (white, yellow, or fruit-flavored) and pudding mix (vanilla, lemon, or orange).
8. Coconut can be substituted for nuts if desired.
9. Possible combinations:
- Yellow cake mix and vanilla instant pudding mix
- Lemon cake mix and lemon instant pudding mix
- Orange cake mix and vanilla instant pudding mix
- Yellow cake mix and butterscotch instant pudding mix
